headline: ‘Hoppers’ Scores Pixar’s Biggest Original Animated Opening in Years
summary: The well-reviewed animated movie opened with $88 million worldwide this weekend., while “The Bride!” flopped.

raw.headline: ‘Hoppers’ Scores Pixar’s Biggest Original Animated Opening in Years

headline: Disney Leadership Shift Reshapes Streaming Strategy And Global Parks Growth
summary: Josh D'Amaro has been appointed CEO of Walt Disney (NYSE:DIS), marking a leadership transition at the top of the company. Key executives, including Chief Communications Officer Kristina Schake, are departing as part of a wider management reshuffle. Disney has arranged new credit agreements and is moving to combine Disney+ and Hulu into a single streaming app. The company is also planning international expansion that includes a new theme park in Abu Dhabi. For you as an investor, this is all...

headline: Charter Communications CEO: Broadband Growth Is Priority as Big Investments Wrap and 2026 Looms
summary: Charter Communications (NASDAQ:CHTR) President and CEO Chris Winfrey told investors at the Morgan Stanley conference that the company’s “priority one, two, and three” is returning to broadband customer growth, with 2026 positioned as a key year as major multi-year investment programs near completion

headline: Online age-verification tools spread across U.S. for child safety, but adults are being surveilled
summary: New age-verification laws and tools are designed for child safety on social media and the internet, but adults are in the crosshairs, say privacy experts.
